headline: Fast food value war: McDonald’s vs Taco Bell vs Chipotle
summary: Most Americans no longer see fast food as a good value, according to a recent Lending Tree survey. "Seventy-eight percent of consumers view fast food as a luxury because it’s become increasingly expensive. Additionally, half of Americans say they view fast food as a luxury because they’re ...
